product_page.spec_line: 260 g/m², 90% Cotton 10% Polyamide, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), 3/1S Twill Fabric
description_blocks: ArWoWear T30 Flame Pro is light weight 260 g/m², 90% cotton 10% polyamide, vat dyed, flame retardant workwear fabric.
It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
It is durable up to 100 washing.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
Ar Wo Wear T30 Flame Pro
260 g/m² , 90% Cotton 10% Polyamide, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), 3/1S Twill Fabric

ArWoWear T30 Flame Pro is light weight 260 g/m², 90% cotton 10% polyamide, vat dyed, flame retardant workwear fabric. It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification. It is durable up to 100 washing. Technical Parameters Fiber 90% Cotton (CO) 10% Polyamide (PA) EN ISO 2076 Yarn Warp:30/2Ne; Weft:30/2Ne EN ISO 2060 Weight 260 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp>1200N; Weft>1000N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>25N; Weft>20N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 6-7 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Flame Retardant Coveralls Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Flame and Heat Protection Yes EN ISO 11612 Welding Protection Yes EN ISO 11611 Arc Protection Class 1 (4kA) EN ISO 61482-1-2 ATPV > 10 cal/cm² EN ISO 61482-1-1 Technical Documents >> ArWoWear T30 Flame Pro Data Sheet Certificates

ArWoWear T30 Flame Pro is light weight 260 g/m², 90% cotton 10% polyamide, vat dyed, flame retardant workwear fabric. It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification. It is durable up to 100 washing.
